classification_categories.blocked_substrate: Row requires WBC substrate that is blocked pending M6A implementation.
classification_categories.landed: Runtime implementation exists with persistence, dispatch, or external effects wired.
classification_categories.m6a_owned_substrate: Row is the M6A target substrate — schema-only currently, implementation planned for this milestone.
classification_categories.schema_only: Schema declarations exist but no runtime store, I/O, mutation, dispatch, or external effects are implemented.
classification_categories.unmatched: No WBC surface exists for this row; it belongs to another owner and has no WBC mapping.
